scripts.build:mac:arm64:dmg: pnpm version:prepare && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin --bundles app,dmg
scripts.build:mac:universal:dmg: pnpm version:prepare && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles app,dmg
scripts.build:win:x64:exe: pnpm version:prepare && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis
scripts.build:win:x64:msi: pnpm version:prepare && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles msi
scripts.build:linux:x64:appimage: pnpm version:prepare && pnpm --dir apps/desktop exec tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles appimage
